title: Playground Command Inspector
concept: A table-led management screen for plugin developers where a persistent command launcher is the primary discovery surface and every current Playground action resolves into a compact inspector with the right form, warning, or Site Manager tab.
focus: blue, green, and amber status language
flows: Search the action registry to start Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or Blueprint gallery entries.
Save the temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible copy progress, then manage saved Playgrounds with open, rename, and delete actions.
Use Site Manager inspector tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint bundle editing, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, export to GitHub, and zip download.
Browse featured Blueprints and all 43 gallery entries with search and category filters.
Navigate and refresh the active embedded WordPress path while preserving compact preview context.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
